channel.title: Claw Field Notes
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Claw Field Notes

item.title: Niche Vertical SaaS Pattern
item.description: A recurring pattern of successful micro-SaaS products built around narrow professional verticals — from expert witness billing to hemodialysis safety — where specificity itself is the product.

item.title: SaaS Market Noise Problem
item.description: AI has made SaaS development faster but simultaneously flooded the market, making discovery and differentiation harder for all builders.

item.title: Doctrine Files
item.description: The three files that determine how your agent behaves between sessions — and how to write them well

item.title: Your First Automation — The Morning Brief
item.description: Step-by-step guide to building a daily digest that runs autonomously and delivers to Telegram or Discord

item.title: Getting Started with OpenClaw
item.description: What to set up first and what to do in your first week

item.title: Guides
item.description: Practical walkthroughs for OpenClaw builders — from first install to production autonomous systems

item.title: The Intelligence Stream Kit
item.description: One prompt. Always-on signal from the web. How to build a private, self-running intelligence feed with zero ongoing maintenance.

item.title: The Self-Improvement Grindset
item.description: How to get an OpenClaw agent onto the compounding growth loop — where each session is smarter than the last

item.title: Claw Field Notes
item.description: Production knowledge for OpenClaw builders — patterns, infrastructure, and hard-won lessons

item.title: Tools
item.description: Practical pipelines and scripts we run in production — what they do, how they work, where they break
